data.body: PUSHED leaf 2ad8 as Gerrit change 749 (stacked on 748), commit 8245c0c60. Targeted regression (185 tests incl. move/coach/registry/code-review ecosystem + both changes) GREEN; lint+typecheck+zizmor+actionlint clean. Move overlay blast radius confirmed nil (packaged MOVE_REGISTRY untouched; code-review uses a separate .rebar/code_review_moves.json; docs-table parser ignores non-numeric ids). Votes on 748 & 749 still pending (NEW, no Verified/LLM-Review yet). Now claiming 21dd (serpent, eval calibration + live-LLM [operator-attested] AC).
